hero.subtitle: Where evidence-based protocol meets ancient wisdom

founder.quote: Healing is not just the absence of disease, but the presence of harmony between the physical and the spiritual.
founder.bio:
Dr. Prerna Kumar is a distinguished Internist and Nephrologist with extensive clinical expertise from premier institutions in the United States and India. A graduate of Internal Medicine from Montefiore Medical Center at Albert Einstein College of Medicine in New York, she pursued her DM in Nephrology at the University of Iowa, followed by specialized fellowship training in Transplant Nephrology.

Before returning to India, Dr. Kumar served as an Assistant Professor of Medicine and Surgery in Transplant Nephrology at the University of Illinois, Chicago. Her practice focuses on adult medicine, specializing in the management of complex chronic conditions, acute illnesses, and preventive care.

With a dedicated focus on hypertension and kidney health—ranging from chronic kidney disease to transplant care—Dr. Kumar believes in a holistic approach. She integrates yoga, meditation, and spiritual well-being into her medical philosophy, ensuring a comprehensive path to healing for every patient.

philosophy.hinduismText: The Bhagavad Gita describes the universe as an Ashvattha tree with its roots above and branches below. It symbolizes the origin of creation in the higher realms of consciousness.
philosophy.ayurvedaText: In Ayurveda, the human body is viewed as an extension of the cosmic tree. Health is the result of nourishing the roots—the life force—rather than just treating the wilting leaves.
philosophy.rootSoulText: We address the underlying spiritual and energetic causes that often precede physical symptoms.
philosophy.branchSymptomText: The physical manifestations are viewed as signals from the root, guiding us back to the source of imbalance.

individualCare.title: No Size Fits All
individualCare.description: Recognizing each patient as a unique individual, not just a set of symptoms.

individualCare.title: USA Protocol
individualCare.description: Critical care protocol merged with evidence-based rigor and traditional wisdom.

individualCare.title: Ancient Wisdom
individualCare.description: Bridging allopathy with nature's timeless intelligence and spiritual insight.
